offer: For property managers handling 5–15 vacation rentals, inefficient booking and guest communication causes late responses and missed bookings. We streamline these processes instead of manual tracking and communication via email and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient booking and guest communication processes
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property managers
try_it: Let users try cleaning schedule management and guest communication templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
